summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Big Wheels Car Rentals landing page. All core features tested and working correctly including hero section, car listings, WhatsApp booking, navigation, and mobile responsiveness.

design_issues.flow: Hero section Book on WhatsApp button
design_issues.issue: Hero Book on WhatsApp button links to #cars instead of WhatsApp with prefilled message

passed_tests: Hero section with correct title and Call Now button working
Trust badges (4) displaying correctly: Minimum 2 Days Booking, Instant Confirmation, Airport Delivery, Best Price Guarantee
All 13 cars correctly listed and sorted by price (₹1000 to ₹3500)
Car specifications accurate (tested WagonR: Manual, 5 Seats, 4 Luggage, Petrol, 34 Ltr)
Car badges working (Automatic, 7 Seater, Premium, Adventure, Soft Top)
WhatsApp links use correct format wa.me/917020776990 with car-specific prefilled messages
All Call Now links use correct format tel:+917020776990 (17 links total)
Why Choose Us section with 4 features displaying correctly
Service Areas section with 10 locations displaying correctly
Testimonials section with 3 customer reviews displaying correctly
Final CTA section with working WhatsApp and Call buttons
Floating WhatsApp button working and positioned correctly
Sticky header navigation with smooth scroll working for all 4 nav links
Mobile responsive design with mobile menu toggle working correctly
All buttons are clickable and not disabled
success_percentage: frontend: 95% (1 minor issue out of 16 major features tested)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Hero section 'Book on WhatsApp' button - should link to WhatsApp with prefilled message instead of #cars anchor link. Currently it scrolls to cars section instead of opening WhatsApp.
